title: Tickeron officially announces the launch of our Affiliate Program!
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
The main provisions of the affiliate program:

\- Model Revenue Share

\- 90-day cookie

\- Over the course of a year you receive 30% commissions on all payments that your referrals make

More details here [https://tickeron.com/affiliate-program/](https://tickeron.com/affiliate-program/)

Earn money with the best analytical financial platform powered by AI!
